name: synth-protocol
description: SYNTH — agent-to-agent x402 payments on Arc via Circle Nanopayments.

scripts.start:agents: concurrently -n web,doc,code,syn -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "tsx src/agents/web-research.ts" "tsx src/agents/doc-analysis.ts" "tsx src/agents/code-review.ts" "tsx src/agents/synthesis.ts"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n agents,router -c cyan,magenta "npm:start:agents" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/health http://localhost:3002/health http://localhost:3003/health http://localhost:3004/health && npm run start:router"
